arts.ttl: Joleon Lescott explains how infamous car tweet came about as Jack Grealish blamed
arts.sum: Joleon Lescott has revealed how Manchester City winger Jack Grealish was partly to blame for his infamous tweet during Aston Villa's relegation season in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Burnley and West Brom eye 'exceptional' midfielder who wants to replicate Rodri, January move on cards
arts.sum: There are at least four Championship clubs in the race...

arts.ttl: Man City could wreck Liverpool transfer plan and hand Arne Slot major blow
arts.sum: Manchester City could hand Liverpool and Arne Slot a major blow in the transfer market as they look to dent their rivals Premier League title hopes

arts.ttl: Newcastle winger to snub transfer interest and sign new deal
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon has reached an agreement with Newcastle United over a new contract. Gordon has emerged as an integral part of Eddie Howe’s side since signing from Everton in a £45m deal in January 2023. The winger was named as Newcastle’s Player of the Season for 2023/24 after an excellent first full season at […] The post Newcastle winger to snub transfer interest and sign new deal first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: It's costing me money to play for Bordeaux - ex-Newcastle star Andy Carroll explains shock move - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: With the club recovering after going into receivership and suffering a double relegation punishment, Carroll told the French media: "To be honest, it’s even costing me money to come and play for Bordeaux but I’m playing football and I am simply happy to be playing football. I want to be part of the history of this club and to be honest it's not a question of money.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon contract offer on table as Eddie Howe admits Newcastle fear with Liverpool lurking
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon has had a contract offer put in front of him by Newcastle United with Eddie Howe today urging him to sign it. Howe had previously stated the need for Gordon to sign the deal in order to get back to his best form: "I think having your players secure in their futures is key to their performances.

arts.ttl: Newcastle hit with injury blow as star striker Alexander Isak emerges as a major doubt for Man City clash
arts.sum: CRAIG HOPE: Mail Sport reported last week that the Swede was struggling with a fresh toe complaint and that a late call would be made on his participation at Fulham.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe sends blunt Newcastle warning and promises to make "difficult choices"
arts.sum: Newcastle face Manchester City this weekend, off the back of their worst performance of the season at Fulham - with Eddie Howe warning he is ready to make some difficult calls

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe puts ball in Anthony Gordon’s court with Newcastle contract admission
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has confirmed he’d like Anthony Gordon to sign a new contract. The 23-year-old winger had become unsettled after a failed transfer to Liverpool in the summer left him wondering about his place in the Newcastle United team. Suffering as a result of the uncertainty, the former Everton winger’s form has dipped, opening the […] The post Eddie Howe puts ball in Anthony Gordon’s court with Newcastle contract admission appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Revealed: The BIZARRE reason why Matt Targett has been ruled out of Newcastle's clash with champions Man City
arts.sum: Newcastle host the champions at St James' Park in the 12:30pm kick-off and could leapfrog them if they win by four or more goals.
